description:
Redis is an open source, advanced key-value store. It is often referred to as a data structure server since keys can contain strings, hashes, lists, sets and sorted sets.

      This package will install Redis as a Windows Service running at http:localhost:6379.

      This is a packaging of work by:
      
      Salvatore Sanfilippo (@antirez) who wrote Redis: https://github.com/antirez/redis
      Dusan Majkic (@dmajkic) who ported Redis to Windows: https://github.com/dmajkic/redis
      Rui Lopes (@ruiglopes) who added the Windows installer: https://github.com/rgl/redis
summary: Run redis as a Windows Service
author: Salvatore Sanfilippo, Dusan Majkic, Rui Lopes
